future_extension_columns.drug_diffusion: Recorded for future model extension only. The validated Phase 1 drug-release solver does not expose a drug diffusion coefficient, so this column does not influence current simulation outputs.

model_derived_filtering_rules.finite_outputs: all generated numeric values must be finite.
model_derived_filtering_rules.maximum_tumor_volume: final_tumor_volume must not exceed carrying_capacity=20000000, the logistic-growth capacity in parameters.py.
model_derived_filtering_rules.nonnegative_final_tumor_volume: solve_tumor_growth clamps negative tumor populations to zero.
model_derived_filtering_rules.parameter_ranges: candidate parameters must remain inside PARAMETER_RANGES.
model_derived_filtering_rules.target_policy: tumor_reduction_percent is never clipped and is not rejected solely because it is negative.

sampling_method: Latin Hypercube Sampling (SciPy) with model-derived diverse subset selection
